Bombshell (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $31,762,808Details
International Box Office $29,641,586
Worldwide Box Office $61,404,394
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $491,467
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $997,882
Total $1,489,349
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A revealing look inside the most powerful and controversial media empire of all time; Fox News, and the explosive story of the women who brought down the infamous man who created it.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$319,157 (1.0% of total gross)
Legs:6.22 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:51.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$32,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:4 opening theaters/1,721 max. theaters, 4.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $41,433,148

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 13th, 2019 (Limited) by Lionsgate
December 20th, 2019 (Expands Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: December 18th, 2019 (Wide) (Egypt)
December 18th, 2019 (Wide) (West Indies)

December 19th, 2019 (Wide) (Lebanon)
December 19th, 2019 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
Video Release: February 25th, 2020 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for sexual material and language throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2605 (Cert #52395), 11/20/2019)
Running Time: 108 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Breaking the Fourth Wall, Intertitle, Voiceover/Narration

Social setting: TV News
Subgenre: Biographical Drama
Time period setting: 2010s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Denver & Delilah Films, Lighthouse Entertainment, Bron Studios, Everyman Pictures, Lionsgate, Creative Wealth Media Finance, Annapurna Pictures, Gramsci
Production Countries: United States, Canada
Languages: English
